response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements made during the game's redevelopment. Although we successfully nearly doubled the frame rate by implementing optimization features in the framework, the integration of new hardware-intensive features such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands introduces new performance considerations. We aim to maintain a balance between these elements.  
Picture #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the redeveloped game, each character has a specific stomach capacity that determines how much "body fluid" they can absorb through their womb, stomach, and bowels. For instance, Dr. Anya can take in 4000ml of sperm without overflowing, whereas Alet can only take 2800ml. Male test subjects release a varying amount of semen depending on their type: a Dreamer ejaculates approximately 10-15ml per climax, while an Elder Thing delivers 400-600ml into their partner.  
Picture #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice graphics. The fluid effects are not pre-defined in sexual scenes and instead trigger dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy level, and stamina. Certain character perks, resulting from experimentation with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or significant squirting.  
Picture #4 and #5 demonstrate dynamic body interactions and skin decals in VR, with hands moving through a VR controller.  
Pictures #6, #7, and #8 preview upcoming bondage devices and cooperative sexual scenarios. More details will be released next month.  
The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
